ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this module. This helps OpenContent sync with DNN module settings.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create #anchor-links on the page. Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Shown above the spotlight card.

SectionDescription.helper: Optional. Short supporting copy shown above the spotlight card.
SectionDescription.placeholder: Highlight a special venue, place, or destination with a split layout.

CardHeading.helper: Optional, but strongly recommended. Main heading shown in the left content area.
CardHeading.placeholder: Our Principal Venue: The Hemlock Glade

CardDescription.helper: Optional. Main descriptive text for the spotlight card.
CardDescription.placeholder: Located just 45 minutes from the city, our flagship sanctuary offers 40 acres of private old-growth forest...

CardBackgroundColorClass.helper: Required. Choose the card background color class. This uses the same expanded background options as the template settings.

Link.helper: Optional. Choose where this card should link.

LinkText.helper: Optional. Visible text for the link.

LinkTarget.helper: Optional. Defaults to Same Tab if nothing is selected.

LinkIcon.helper: Optional. Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building

CardImage.helper: Required. Recommended: landscape image at least 1600px wide. This image fills the right side of the card.

ImageInfoText.helper: Optional. Small badge-style text shown over the image.
